easy.question: Who was the first President of the United States?
easy.comment: George Washington served from 1789 to 1797 and is known as the 'Father of His Country.'
easy.taunt: Come on, even fifth graders know this one!

easy.question: In which year did World War II end?
easy.comment: World War II officially ended in 1945 after the surrender of Germany and Japan.

medium.question: Which empire was ruled by Genghis Khan?
medium.comment: Genghis Khan founded the Mongol Empire in the early 13th century, which became the largest contiguous empire in history.

hard.question: The Treaty of Westphalia in 1648 ended which war?
hard.comment: The Treaty of Westphalia ended the Thirty Years' War in the Holy Roman Empire and set the foundation for modern state sovereignty.
hard.taunt: A deep cut—most people don’t get this without history books.
